text.title: Eloquent ORM Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real Laravel + Eloquent codebases. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Endpoint `POST /users` accepts `is_admin=1` and persists it; attacker self-promotes.
antipattern.fix: Switch to `protected $fillable = [...]` with the exact list of mass-assignable columns. Add a feature test verifying `is_admin` is dropped from input.

antipattern.symptom: Accessor returns the wrong value depending on Laravel minor version; behaviour swings between calls.
antipattern.root-cause: Model defines both `getFullNameAttribute()` and `protected function fullName(): Attribute = ...`; resolution precedence is undefined.
antipattern.fix: Pick `Attribute::make()`; delete the legacy `getXAttribute()` overrides. Standardise across all models.

antipattern.symptom: List endpoint executes 200 queries for 200 rows; APM trace shows one extra `SELECT` per row.
antipattern.root-cause: Controller iterates collection and reads `$user->organization->name`; eager-load not done at the repository boundary.
antipattern.fix: Move eager-load to the repository (`->with('organization')->get()`). Enable `Model::preventLazyLoading(! app()->isProduction())` in `AppServiceProvider`.

antipattern.symptom: User record exists in `users` but no rows in `user_roles`; the role attach failed but the user creation already committed.
antipattern.fix: Wrap the create + attach sequence in `DB::transaction(fn() => ...)`. Dispatch downstream side effects via `DB::afterCommit`.

antipattern.symptom: `SELECT * FROM events WHERE customer_id = ?` triggers a full table scan; query latency P99 grows linearly with row count.
antipattern.root-cause: Foreign-key / filter column lacks an index in the migration.
antipattern.fix: Add `$table->index('customer_id')` in the migration. Audit `where` / `orderBy` columns weekly with `pg_stat_statements`.
